chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No.363 of 2017 The Commissioner Inland Revenue Versus M/s Arshad Amjad & Abid (Pvt.) Ltd. Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection No.19 2. For orders on CMA 469/17 3. For hearing of main case Dated: 12.11.2021 None present. -.-.- This Reference Application is pending since 2017 and even notices have not been issued till date. Today the applicant’s counsel is called absent. There is no intimation either. Instant Income Tax Reference Application is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge
